name: intro
label: Intro
default: Ten disciplines, one operating partner. We staff senior, run them against a single growth thesis, and report on contribution margin — not vanity metrics.

default.card_body: Performance creative and media on Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, Snap, Pinterest, X — engineered for contribution margin.
Search engine marketing — any ad-click — including Google, Bing and Yahoo. Performance-engineered.
Technical and editorial SEO that compounds — built around your buyer journey, not vanity rankings.
Performance creative at scale — motion, lifestyle and brand — produced by our in-house studio.
Lifecycle, retention and onboarding flows that turn first-time buyers into a compounding revenue line.
Always-on social that earns share-of-search and feeds your paid funnel with proof and warmth.
Implementation, automation and revenue ops on HubSpot — so sales and marketing finally speak one language.
High-converting websites and stores on Webflow, Shopify and WordPress — designed by performance marketers.
Vetted creator programmes with full-funnel measurement — not vanity, not gifting, real revenue.
Server-side tracking, attribution, and board-grade reporting your CFO will actually quote.
